title: coccocypselum hispidulum
intro: Coccocypselum hispidulum, also known as the Rough-leaf Jesuit's bark or Rough-leaf Psyche, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Coccocypselum hispidulum has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Coccocypselum hispidulum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and potential health benefits.
